mapper.select: SELECT r.*, s.name as supplier_name, w.name as warehouse_name FROM inventory_inbound_records r LEFT JOIN inventory_suppliers s ON r.supplier_id = s.id LEFT JOIN inventory_warehouses w ON r.warehouse_id = w.id WHERE r.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO inventory_inbound_records (record_no, inbound_date, supplier_id, warehouse_id, products, total_amount, status, operator, remark) VALUES (#{recordNo}, #{inboundDate}, #{supplierId}, #{warehouseId}, #{products}, #{totalAmount}, #{status}, #{operator}, #{remark})
mapper.update: UPDATE inventory_inbound_records SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM inventory_inbound_records
AND status = #{status}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM inventory_inbound_records WHERE DATE(inbound_date) = CURDATE()
